info: Z-Image-Turbo starter — import in ComfyUI, then load the official Z-Image-Turbo workflow from https://docs.comfy.org/tutorials/image/z-image/z-image-turbo or merge these model paths: text_encoders/qwen_3_4b.safetensors, diffusion_models/z_image_turbo_bf16.safetensors, vae/ae.safetensors.
